name: ai-bug-fixer
description: AI-powered bug fixing system with service-oriented plugin architecture

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ai-bug-fixer/service-sdk && npm run build -w @ai-bug-fixer/service-locator && npm run build -w @ai-bug-fixer/service-github && npm run build -w @ai-bug-fixer/service-sentry && npm run build -w @ai-bug-fixer/service-circleci && npm run build -w @ai-bug-fixer/service-claude-code
